sources.authority: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)
sources.notes: FDSN event API returning QuakeML. Parameters: starttime, endtime, minmag, maxmag, lat, lon, maxradius, limit. Also supports GeoJSON output via format=geojson. Real-time earthquake data for Italy and Mediterranean.

sources.authority: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)
sources.notes: Same FDSN endpoint with GeoJSON output. Supports CORS. Preferred format for web mapping.

sources.authority: ISPRA - Istituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Ricerca Ambientale
sources.notes: WFS service for the National Wave Buoy Network (RON). Returns station locations and metadata for wave monitoring buoys around Italian coasts. Also available as WMS for map visualization.

sources.authority: ISPRA - Istituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Ricerca Ambientale
sources.notes: WMS service for the National Tide Gauge Network (RMN). 36 stations measuring sea level, wind speed/direction, air temperature, pressure, water temperature. Real-time data transmission via UMTS/IRIDIUM.

Daily air quality monitoring data for Puglia region. Returns CSV with NO2, O3, PM10, PM2.5, CO, C6H6, SO2 measurements per station. Also supports GeoJSON output via JSONRequest parameter. Station list at /QualitaAria/Stations.

Terna Open API for Italian electricity system total demand by bidding zone. Requires OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Also available: generation by source (/generation/v2.0/electrical-energy-by-source), demand coverage, cross-border flows. Free registration at developer.terna.it.

sources.authority: ISPRA - Istituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Ricerca Ambientale (SDI)
sources.attribution: ISPRA - PNACC (Piano Nazionale di Adattamento ai Cambiamenti Climatici)
sources.notes: ISPRA Spatial Data Infrastructure WFS for the National Climate Change Adaptation Plan (PNACC) precipitation/climate grid layers. Confirmed 200 application/json (GetFeature on pnacc:Clima_PT1). Other layers: pnacc:pnacc_prec_cumulata_mesi_est_inv (seasonal cumulative precipitation).
